verdict.rationale: The operations review reports Q4 2025 net revenue retention as 106.0% on a trailing 12-month cohort basis, which is the same entity/period/scope as the claim but a different value than the claimed 108.0%. The customer appendix (expected evidence type) does not carry an NRR figure, so the ops review is the authoritative source.
verdict.suggested_action: Reconcile the master document's 108.0% NRR against the operations review's 106.0% (Q4 2025, trailing-12-month cohort); confirm which is correct before publishing.
